sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n116185" key="w)mi/dios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὠμίδιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, cited as radical of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐπωμίδιος,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theognost.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Can.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">54</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
